summary: The authors present a diversity-aware dataset construction framework for materials science that maximizes informativeness for target properties while preventing performance degradation on untargeted ones.

blocks.content: # Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives

source_span.quote: # Building informative materials datasets beyond targeted objectives

blocks.content: Here, we present a framework for dataset construction that maximizes informativeness for target properties of interest while preserving performance on untargeted ones.

source_span.quote: Here, we present a framework for dataset construction that maximizes informativeness for target properties of interest while preserving performance on untargeted ones.

blocks.content: Our approach uses diversity-aware selection to ensure broad coverage of the materials space.

source_span.quote: Our approach uses diversity-aware selection to ensure broad coverage of the materials space.

blocks.content: In noisy experimental dataset construction, we find that without our diversity-aware framework, prediction performance on untargeted properties can degrade by up to 40% relative to random sampling, whereas applying our framework yields improvements of up to 10% .

source_span.quote: In noisy experimental dataset construction, we find that without our diversity-aware framework, prediction performance on untargeted properties can degrade by up to 40% relative to random sampling, whereas applying our framework yields improvements of up to 10% .

blocks.content: For targeted properties, performance can degrade with respect to random sampling by up to 12.5% without diversity, while our framework achieves gains of up to 25%.

source_span.quote: For targeted properties, performance can degrade with respect to random sampling by up to 12.5% without diversity, while our framework achieves gains of up to 25%.

blocks.content: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns.

source_span.quote: Materials science data collection can be expensive, making the reuse and long-term utility of datasets critical important for future discovery campaigns.

blocks.content: As a result, the constructed datasets remain broadly informative across considered and unconsidered outcomes, ensuring unbiased quality entries and mitigating cold-start limitations in subsequent modeling and discovery campaigns.

source_span.quote: As a result, the constructed datasets remain broadly informative across considered and unconsidered outcomes, ensuring unbiased quality entries and mitigating cold-start limitations in subsequent modeling and discovery campaigns.
